excerpts:
Section Title: S&P Asia Pacific Ex-Japan REIT > Description
Content:
The S&P Asia Pacific Ex-Japan REIT is designed to measure publicly traded equity real estate investment trusts (REITs) domiciled in the developed Asia Pacific market excluding Japan. The index includes eligible publicly traded REITs from Australia, Hong Kong, New Zealand, Singapore and South Korea.

results.title: Top[x] Asia Pacific ex-Japan Funds and ETFs in [Today.year()] - MutualFunds.com
excerpts:
Section Title: Asia Pacific ex-Japan
Content:
Asia-Pacific ex-Japan mutual funds and ETFs invest in a wide range of... Asia-Pacific ex-Japan mutual funds and ETFs invest in a wide range of asset classes, including equities, fixed income, commodities, and alternatives. Funds in this category may have significant exposure to the consumer discretionary, information technology, and financial services sectors. These funds cover a wide geographic range but tend to focus on export-oriented nations such as [Hong Kong](https://mutualfunds.com/geography-categories/hong-kong-funds-and-etfs/) , [Singapore](https://mutualfunds.com/geography-categories/singapore-funds-and-etfs/) , [Taiwan](https://mutualfunds.com/geography-categories/taiwan-funds-and-etfs/) , and [South Korea](https://mutualfunds.com/geography-categories/south-korea-funds-and-etfs/) . Typically, these funds invest at least 70% of total assets in equities and at least 70% of equities in Pacific countries, with less than 10% in Japan.
 ...
